# UmanoAI – Conversational AI and Automation for Argentina

> UmanoAI is an automation and conversational AI company based in Argentina.

## Company overview
UmanoAI builds practical digital solutions for businesses and public organizations that need to automate customer communication, internal workflows and reporting.

## Main services

### WhatsApp bots
Automated assistants for customer support, lead qualification, commercial follow-up and FAQ handling.

### Voicebots
AI voice agents for phone-based customer service, with optional human handoff.

### Business process automation
Workflow automation connecting spreadsheets, CRMs, ERPs, forms and APIs.

### Custom CRM
CRM systems adapted to real operational workflows.

### Web development
Landing pages and business websites designed to generate leads and integrate with automation flows.

### Power BI dashboards
Analytics dashboards for sales, operations and business visibility.

## Typical use cases
- customer service automation
- lead qualification
- WhatsApp sales flows
- reporting automation
- debt follow-up automation
- internal workflow digitization
- CRM pipeline visibility
- public service attention flows

## Industries and profiles served
- SMEs
- service businesses
- retail
- automotive
- agriculture
- healthcare
- education
- public sector organizations
